commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: world-class hardening (#28)

## Summary

Comprehensive hardening pass across the entire Pathfinder codebase —
scripts, tests, documentation, and infrastructure. Moves the project
from 7.5/10 to 9+/10 on the quality scale.

- **Input validation**: `generate-diagrams.py` now validates journey
structure before processing (prevents crashes on malformed
`journeys.json`)
- **Refactored core**: `build_decision_tree()` broken from 143 lines
into 3 focused helpers; `generate-ui-test.py` append logic uses proper
brace-counting
- **Type hints + f-strings**: All 10 scripts now have type hints on
every function and consistent f-string formatting
- **55 tests passing** (up from 27): 12 new edge-case tests, integration
test, no-Pillow fallback test
- **0 lint errors**: ruff clean with stricter rules (import sorting,
bugbear, line-length enforced)
- **New docs**: CHANGELOG.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, enhanced
CONTRIBUTING/SECURITY, SwiftUI/iPad patterns in xcuitest.md
- **Evals expanded**: 13 fixture files, 3 new scenarios (malformed JSON,
empty project, missing journeys.json)
- **Infrastructure fixes**: post-commit hook logs errors instead of
swallowing them, PR template adds breaking-change checks

## Test plan

- [x] `python3 -m pytest tests/ -v` — 55 passed in 1.9s
- [x] `ruff check skills/pathfinder/scripts/ tests/` — All checks passed
- [ ] CI pipeline passes on Python 3.9 and 3.12
- [ ] Manual smoke test: `/map` -> `/blaze` -> `/scout` -> `/summit` on
a real project

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Update: renomear sessão WAHA para TIBOT

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor: server passes through AZ statements, client dispatches on code

Server no longer interprets statement codes — it parses payload strings
to objects and forwards { denied: true, statements } as 202. One place
to add new statement handling: the client dispatch loop in app.js.

Client dispatches on stmt.code in a for loop: deny-stepup (MFA/OTP),
deny-verify (PingOne Verify QR), and a fallback warn for unknown codes.
Payload fields are read directly from stmt.payload — no field-mapping
between server and client.

When this moves to an API Gateway, the gateway enforces PERMIT/DENY
at the network layer; the same 202+statements pattern applies unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add features.py, GCN/GAT models, and pipeline smoke tests

src/features.py
  - enrich_graph(): adds dist to goal, angle, pressure index, role encoding
  - edge features: pass angle toward goal, velocity alignment (tracking data)

src/models/gcn.py
  - FootballGCN: GCNConv × n_layers → global mean pool → MLP head

src/models/gat.py
  - FootballGAT: GATv2Conv with optional edge features → pool → MLP head

tests/test_pipeline.py
  - 18 smoke tests covering graph builder, feature enrichment, GCN, GAT
  - All synthetic data, no external downloads required

Add SceneRay mode 9 (WebGPU JSON), remove mesh FMA workaround

SceneRay.cpp: Add mode 9 using buildScenePacket/serializeScenePacketJSON
from RayBackend, enabling native PyMOL to export WebGPU scene JSON via
_cmd.get_webgpu_scene(). This keeps the WASM and native code paths in sync.

Remove knownPlatformPsnr:45 workaround for wasm_rep_mesh — native PyMOL
rebuilt with -ffp-contract=off eliminates ARM64 FMA divergence, improving
mesh PSNR from 49.27→61.72 dB (above 60dB PASS threshold).

100/100 parity tests PASS, mean 98.59 dB, min 61.72 dB.

- Database (branch: master)
- UI-UX (branch: master)

Each submodule is pinned to its latest harmonized commit
from the ecosystem-wide restructuring.

Clone with: git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/pragnakar/META_PROMPTS.git

commit.message:
fix: mute trailing scenes correctly regardless of clip duration drift

buildMusicVolumeFilter now uses gte(t,start) for any muted segment with
no subsequent audible scene, instead of between(t,start,end). This prevents
background music from bleeding back in at the tail of the last muted scene
when actual encoded clip durations differ from the DB scene.duration values.

commit.message:
Context-aware modernization: au→aʻu when meaning 'I/me'

- When gloss is NOT possessive 'your', display 'au' as 'aʻu' (proper glottal stop)
- When gloss IS possessive 'your', keep 'au' unchanged
- Examples: 'ia te aʻu' (me), 'O Aʻu' (I am) vs 'au poloaiga' (your commandments)
- Bump cache to v117

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix isolation bat files: add stdin read for Wazuh 4.x stateful AR protocol

Wazuh 4.x sends JSON to script stdin before execution. Bat files must
consume it with 'set /p json=' or wazuh-execd blocks the process.

fix: update 2 files (package-lock.json, package.json)

Trigger deploy workflow on .env.secret changes

The deploy workflow only watched docker-compose.yml files, so secret
file updates were not triggering deployments to Portainer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: new voice server — Twilio ConversationRelay + Claude AI

Replaces the fragile <Gather> webhook loop architecture with a modern
WebSocket-based approach using Twilio ConversationRelay:

- Single persistent WebSocket connection for entire call (no HTTP timeouts)
- Twilio handles STT (Google) and TTS (ElevenLabs) natively
- Claude AI with 9 tools: customer lookup, store search, menu, cart, orders
- Personalized greeting via quick DB lookup in HTTP handler
- Transfer to agent via Twilio REST API call modification
- Order submission with SMS confirmation
- systemd service on port 5050, nginx proxy at /voice/

Old PHP webhook system remains as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): relax smoke test homepage check — /ping only for health gate (#142)

Caddy :80 block only responds to /ping; all other paths return 404
because subdomain Host-header routing only works on port 443 (HTTPS).
The SSH-based health check hits port 80 with a Host header, so / → 404
is expected and correct behaviour, not a service failure.

Pass/fail now depends solely on /ping → 200 "ok". Homepage HTTP code
is still logged as informational.

Fixes: smoke test always failing despite services being healthy.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016J81NcC55Eu3sawwdUdXdb

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Creative Fatigue Dashboard with 5-tab workbook view

New tool for early detection of creative fatigue across Meta and Google ad
platforms. Includes dashboard overview, reference guide, week-over-week
trend tracker, and platform-specific editable spreadsheet trackers with
auto-calculated fatigue scores (0-100 scoring system).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Decision gate system and component instance support (closes #12, closes #13)

Decision gate system (#12):
- Scanner detects 7 decision point types: diamond gradients, complex
  transforms, scale constraints, unknown fonts, image fills,
  unsupported nodes, and component instances
- Inline DecisionPanel in preview area with expandable items,
  severity badges, and radio button option selection
- Decisions stored in Zustand, keyed by nodeId::type
- Pipeline respects decisions: skip nodes, add HTML/CSS comments
  noting where decisions were applied
- All output tabs (HTML/CSS/React/Live) re-render on decision changes

Component instance support (#13):
- INSTANCE nodes detected with purple "I" badge in tree view
- COMPONENT nodes get green "C" badge
- PropertiesPanel shows componentId, variant properties, and
  overridden fields for INSTANCE nodes
- React output can generate typed props interface with default
  values when "Generate props" decision is chosen
- Text children auto-mapped to component props
- Default behavior: flatten to static HTML (preserves fidelity)
- FigmaNode type updated with typed componentProperties and
  overrides array
